prestazioni: Engine: 6G74 MIVEC V6 (3.5L) with forged internals including JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression ratio, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Turbocharged with a Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbo (1.28 A/R turbine housing) running 28 psi of boost on a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with 300mm travel, reinforced spherical bearing upper mounts, and custom valving for Dakar-spec terrain. Front and rear ARB 35mm heavy-duty sway bars with poly bushings, paired with Bilstein B16 remote-reservoir shocks for high-speed desert stability.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in the front and rear differentials, mated to a reinforced transfer case with a 5.28:1 final drive ratio. Custom 300M steel axles with CV joints from a Mitsubishi Fuso Canter, and a Tilton triple-plate ceramic clutch with a 2.8L lightweight flywheel for rapid gear shifts under load.
estetica: Body: Full carbon-fiber widebody kit from Varis Japan, including Dakar-spec fender flares, a vented hood with dual NACA ducts, and a rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks. Front bumper replaced with a custom aluminum unit featuring a 4-point winch mount and auxiliary LED light bar from Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro 20-inch).

Aerodynamics: Custom aluminum roof scoop for intercooler cooling, paired with a rear wing from APR Performance (GTC-300) mounted on adjustable carbon-fiber pedestals. Underbody skid plates from Ralliart with integrated heat shielding for the exhaust and transmission.

Interior: Full Sparco Pro 2000 race seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (FIA-spec with door bars), and a Motec C127 dash logger with GPS lap timer. Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations quick-release unit wrapped in Alcantara, paired with a custom hydraulic handbrake lever.
